data.name: App.Subtitle
data.value: Application and CRM signals into reviewed next actions

data.name: Action.ResetSession.Title
data.value: Clear demo drafts, filters, and the audit log for a fresh run

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Subtitle
data.value: Turn a noisy job market into a governed, evidence-backed decision pipeline: AI runs the volume, human judgment sets the rules, and outcomes feed the next run.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.ReadGuide.Title
data.value: How to read this in 10 seconds

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.ReadGuide.Body
data.value: Start with market volume, follow how it narrows into applications, check which workflow steps are complete, then use the case view to verify evidence and claim boundaries.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Source.Boundary
data.value: Read-only DB · no writeback · no secrets

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Boundary.Body
data.value: This HM demo reads only aggregate application-tracker data. It shows decision logic, evidence review, and human-gated writeback without exposing private outreach, raw messages, secrets, or any write path.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Live.ReadOnly.Body
data.value: Snapshot date {0}; refreshed {1}. The page uses aggregates only and keeps sample cases anonymized.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Live.Fallback.Body
data.value: The live aggregate could not load, so the page is showing sample data and preserving the same no-write boundary.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Metric.Signals.Detail
data.value: AI/rubric screened rows, not manual reads

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Metric.Pipeline.Detail
data.value: Worth human review after AI/rule screen

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Metric.Stages.Detail
data.value: Role briefs, tailoring, apply, follow-up, and learning signals

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.SignalFunnel.Body
data.value: The point is not application volume. The point is how a broad market gets narrowed into roles worth real evidence work.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Funnel.Pipeline.Detail
data.value: Human review decides what enters active effort

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.DecisionPipeline.Body
data.value: Each step turns judgment into an artifact, status, or next action that can be inspected before it affects the system of record.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Evidence.Body
data.value: Mock cases show how fit, claim boundary, and next action stay visible.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Chart.Empty
data.value: No visual aggregate data is available yet

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.DecisionRecords.Body
data.value: Live aggregates stay above. These rows remain demo-safe sample cases; selecting a row updates the case microscope.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.CaseMicroscope.Body
data.value: One case, shown as a defensible evidence chain.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Source.Sample.Detail
data.value: This row is hand-authored sample data that protects private content while showing the page logic.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Source.Live.Detail
data.value: Source is a safe summary from core.jobs, core.applications, and core.descriptions; private contacts, message bodies, and secrets are omitted.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Northstar.RoleContract
data.value: Market sizing, research synthesis, and executive-ready insight handoff.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Northstar.MustProve
data.value: Translate fragmented market notes into a concise recommendation with evidence.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Northstar.CannotBorrow
data.value: Cannot claim prior ownership of a production market intelligence function.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Northstar.NextAction
data.value: Use the routing brief and tailored resume as the HM-facing evidence chain.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Atlas.RoleContract
data.value: CRM hygiene, pipeline reporting, stakeholder handoff, and sales process support.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Atlas.MustProve
data.value: Show data quality judgment and how stale records become next actions.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Atlas.CannotBorrow
data.value: Cannot claim production CRM administration ownership.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Atlas.NextAction
data.value: Finish case packet, then test whether the story reads as RevOps rather than job-search tooling.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Cedar.RoleContract
data.value: Customer issue triage, operational handoff, and follow-up discipline.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Cedar.MustProve
data.value: Prove reliability and context retention without over-indexing on AI language.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Cedar.CannotBorrow
data.value: Cannot frame this as quota-carrying sales ownership.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Cedar.NextAction
data.value: Keep as a warm option; tailor only if outreach or location signal improves.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Orbit.RoleContract
data.value: Claims review, order status, cross-functional support, and bilingual customer context.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Orbit.MustProve
data.value: Clarify whether the role is true sales motion or administrative claims support.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Orbit.CannotBorrow
data.value: Cannot borrow SDR pipeline language if the JD is mainly back-office support.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Orbit.NextAction
data.value: Hold until correct-pool risk is resolved.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Sample.ArtifactEvidence
data.value: Sample cases preserve the concept of JD, routing brief, tailoring proof, and application status without showing private source text.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Sample.LearningHook
data.value: This case shows how an outcome becomes reviewed learning before any rule changes.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.RoleFallback
data.value: No complete role summary yet; use the JD summary and tracker state to confirm what the role actually asks for.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.FitFallback
data.value: Only tracker state is available right now; add role-brief or JD evidence before defending this decision.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.MustProveFallback
data.value: The current match signal is {0}; translate the JD into a provable work object before claiming fit.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.CannotBorrow
data.value: Do not treat tracker status, AI summaries, or private outreach context as completed work. Claims must trace back to the JD, routing brief, tailored resume, or application record.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.Artifact.WithFolder
data.value: An application artifact folder is recorded; this page shows only that evidence exists, not local paths or private file contents.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.Artifact.NoFolder
data.value: No displayable artifact folder is recorded yet; the gap stays visible instead of pretending the evidence is complete.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.Learning.Applied
data.value: Applied cases can move into outcome review: reply, rejection, interview, or silence becomes reviewed learning first.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.Learning.Pending
data.value: Pending cases teach decision quality first: is it worth tailoring, is it the correct pool, and is there a claim ceiling?

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.Pool.Open
data.value: Tracker marks this as an open / correct-pool candidate

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.NextAction.RoleBrief
data.value: Complete the role decision first: clarify JD requirements, correct pool, and claim ceiling.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.NextAction.Tailor
data.value: Next step is resume tailoring; include only evidence supported by the JD and existing experience.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.NextAction.Apply
data.value: Next step is a human apply-or-hold decision; AI must not submit automatically.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.NextAction.FollowUp
data.value: After applying, add follow-up status; this page summarizes workflow without showing private messages.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Case.Live.NextAction.Learn
data.value: Move the outcome into learning review and decide whether to change rules, wording, or source priority.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Checkpoint.Role.DoneEvidence
data.value: Role brief or JD evidence is inspectable.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Checkpoint.Role.WaitingEvidence
data.value: Role decision is incomplete; do not move straight into claims.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Checkpoint.Tailor.DoneEvidence
data.value: Tailoring or resume package status exists.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Checkpoint.Tailor.WaitingEvidence
data.value: Tailoring is incomplete; a generic resume is not role proof.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Checkpoint.Apply.WaitingEvidence
data.value: Application has not been submitted or written back yet.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Checkpoint.FollowUp.DoneEvidence
data.value: Networking or follow-up stage summary exists; private messages stay hidden.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Checkpoint.FollowUp.WaitingEvidence
data.value: Follow-up has not started or has no displayable summary.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Checkpoint.Learning.Evidence
data.value: Every outcome needs human review before becoming a durable rule.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.LearningLoop.Body
data.value: Outcomes become reviewed learning, not automatic rule changes.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Learning.Reply.Detail
data.value: Stakeholder-specific hooks are more useful than generic AI project explanations.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Learning.Rejection.Detail
data.value: When a role asks for production ownership, mark the gap instead of wording around it.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Learning.FollowUp.Detail
data.value: Applications without next action should surface as workflow debt, not hidden notes.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Claim.Say.Body
data.value: AI screened high-volume job rows under rules I defined and reviewed.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Claim.DoNotSay.Body
data.value: I manually read every JD or let AI automatically apply or write back.

data.name: ApplicationIntelligence.Claim.Translate.Body
data.value: Job-market signals become fit, readiness, evidence, and follow-up signals.

data.name: Cockpit.Subtitle
data.value: Track weekly applications, target-role quality, and the evidence behind each decision.

data.name: Cockpit.Semantic.Placeholder
data.value: Show strong fits, sort by company...

data.name: Cockpit.Semantic.NoMatchAi
data.value: {0} did not return a safe grid command: {1}

data.name: Cockpit.Semantic.AiFailedRules
data.value: {0} parsing failed ({1}); local rules applied: {2}. {3} rows visible.

data.name: Cockpit.Semantic.Suggestion.RecentApplied
data.value: Applied jobs from the last 3 days

data.name: Cockpit.Assistant.Welcome
data.value: Hello. I can use the current filter, visible jobs, and selected notes to summarize fit, compare priorities, or flag the next review step.

data.name: Cockpit.Assistant.NotConfigured
data.value: No AI key is configured yet, so the assistant UI can render but cannot generate replies.

data.name: Cockpit.Assistant.Thinking
data.value: {0} is reading the current cockpit context...

data.name: Cockpit.Assistant.Error
data.value: AI Assistant cannot reply right now: {0}

data.name: Cockpit.Evidence.Empty
data.value: Select a job to review the notes.

data.name: Cockpit.Evidence.HiringFocus
data.value: What the employer is looking for

data.name: Cockpit.Meta
data.value: Quality over volume: review the role, tailor the CV, contact people, and track the follow-up.

data.name: Governance.Subtitle
data.value: AI can draft actions, but every change waits for human review and is saved to an audit log.

data.name: Governance.DialogBody
data.value: Review the suggested action before anything changes.

data.name: Governance.ReviewQueueEmpty
data.value: No AI drafts yet. Approve a suggested action above to add items here.

data.name: Governance.AuditSubtitle
data.value: Every AI-assisted action is logged. Manual browsing and filtering are not audited.

data.name: Governance.OutputApproved
data.value: Suggested action generated and opened for review. No data has changed yet.

data.name: Signals.Subtitle
data.value: Recurring market and customer signals from the demo data. Approved AI filters apply here.

data.name: Resources.Subtitle
data.value: Reusable demo resources: proposals, project notes, staff resumes, imagery, feedback notes, and market signals.
